channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Zelensky Signs Defence and Energy Agreements with Azerbaijan as Death Toll from Russian Attacks Climbs
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has signed new agreements with Azerbaijan, focused on military-industrial and energy cooperation, as part of ongoing efforts to bolster Ukraine's defence capabil...

item.title: Survey Shows Many Australian Teens Still Access Social Media Despite Age Ban
item.description: Australia implemented a social media ban restricting users under 16, but early reports suggest it is not fully effective. A recent survey conducted by the UK-based Molly Rose Foundation, which include...

item.title: Hannah Clarke’s Parents Reduce Involvement in Anti-Domestic Violence Foundation
item.description: Sue and Lloyd Clarke, the parents of Hannah Clarke, have decided to step back from the day-to-day running of the Small Steps 4 Hannah Foundation, which they established in memory of their daughter and...

item.title: Two fully leased industrial properties in Fyshwick and Mitchell listed for sale
item.description: Two significant commercial properties in Canberra’s tightly held industrial suburbs of Fyshwick and Mitchell have been brought to market, attracting strong interest from investors. The sites, located ...

item.title: Mali Faces Coordinated Attacks by Militants and Separatists
item.description: Mali is grappling with a severe security crisis after Islamic militants and separatists launched a series of coordinated attacks across the country on Saturday, April 25, 2026. The attacks, considered...

item.title: Concerns Over Governance in SAPS After Masemola's Suspension
item.description: The precautionary suspension of South African National Police Commissioner, General Fannie Masemola, by President Cyril Ramaphosa has raised concerns about the ongoing governance issues within the Sou...

item.title: Chaos Erupts at 'I'm a Celebrity' All-Stars Finale as Adam Thomas is Crowned Winner
item.description: The 'I'm a Celebrity... All Stars' finale took a dramatic and chaotic turn, culminating in Adam Thomas's victory. The live show quickly devolved into a series of heated exchanges and outbursts, most n...

item.title: Government allocates R74m to defend multiple court challenges against NHI Act
item.description: The South African government has allocated R74 million for the 2026/27 financial year to cover legal costs linked to ongoing court challenges against the National Health Insurance (NHI) Act. Health Mi...

item.title: Bianca Catbagan Explores a Queer Reinterpretation of Maria Clara in 'Royal Blood'
item.description: Bianca Catbagan, a Filipino filmmaker now based in Los Angeles, is set to bring her historical drama 'Royal Blood' to life as part of the American Film Institute’s prestigious Directing Workshop for W...

item.title: Don Julio Tequila Partners with AMVCA 2026 as Headline Sponsor

item.title: Iranian President Signals Willingness for Diplomatic Engagement with Washington
item.description: In the context of heightened regional tensions and ongoing military posturing, Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian has formally directed his diplomatic team to explore pathways for renewed engagement ...

item.title: Halifax Tides defeat Ottawa Rapid 3-1 in Northern Super League opener
item.description: Halifax Tides FC opened their Northern Super League campaign with a 3-1 victory over Ottawa Rapid FC, thanks to a strong second-half performance and timely goals from Jordyn Rhodes and Julianne Valler...

item.title: Solly Mapaila discusses SACP's independent election bid and the ANC's response

item.title: Tamil Nadu ordered to implement rehabilitation plan for transgender community
item.description: In a recent ruling, the Madras High Court has directed the Tamil Nadu government to roll out a comprehensive rehabilitation plan for transgender persons, particularly addressing the issue of blindness...

item.title: Gladiator II Finds Success on Global Streaming Platforms, Led by Netflix
item.description: Ridley Scott's Gladiator II, a sequel to the 2000 blockbuster, has become a streaming hit worldwide, especially on Netflix. Released in November 2024, the film follows Lucius Verus Aurelius, played by...

item.title: NiDCOM Advises Nigerians in South Africa to Shut Businesses Amid Rising Xenophobic Violence
item.description: Fresh tension don rise again for South Africa as xenophobic attacks don begin spread across major cities like Cape Town, Durban, East London and parts of KwaZulu-Natal. Because of this situation, Nige...

item.title: Understanding 'wlw' as the Word of the Day for April 26, 2026
item.description: The 'Word of the Day' for April 26, 2026, on ABS-CBN's lifestyle section introduces the acronym 'wlw.' While the exact meaning of 'wlw' is not specified in the excerpt, it can be assumed that the word...

item.title: South Africa’s relay teams show strong Olympic medal potential ahead of 2028
item.description: South Africa’s swimmers have shown promising form that could translate into Olympic relay success at the 2028 Los Angeles Games. Performances at the recent national championships in Gqeberha suggest t...

item.title: Ian Collard to Submit Written Evidence Over Mandelson Vetting Scandal

item.title: Protests across Ontario target Ford government policies on transparency, education funding, and healthcare
